---
title: Resources
---

testing123

## Recommended Books

- [R for Data Science 2nd Edition](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/)
    - One of the authors, Hadley Wickham, is the creator
    of the tidyverse and this is a wonderful resource
    for learning analytics in R. Don't let the Data Science
    in the title intimidate, there is rich info in this
    for R users of all skill levels.
